Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: June 30, 2026

Welcome to Craft Shack. By using this website, you agree to the following terms.

Orders

  • All orders are subject to availability.
  • We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any order.
  • Prices are displayed in the applicable currency and may change without notice.

Payments

Payment must be completed before an order is processed.

Products

We aim to display products accurately; however, colours and appearances may vary depending on your device.

As many items are handmade, slight variations in size, colour, or finish are considered normal and make each item unique.

Intellectual Property

All website content, including images, logos, product descriptions, and designs, belongs to Craft Store unless otherwise stated and may not be copied without permission.

Limitation of Liability

Craft Store is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of this website or our products.

Changes

We may update these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of the website indicates acceptance of any changes.
